# SalesAgent.cz

> AI Sales Development Rep jako outsourcovaná služba pro B2B firmy v ČR/SK a mezinárodně.
> AI Sales Development Rep as an outsourced service for B2B companies in CZ/SK and internationally.

## Co je SalesAgent.cz / What is SalesAgent.cz

SalesAgent.cz provides an outsourced AI SDR (Sales Development Representative) service. It is NOT a SaaS tool — it is a fully managed outbound sales system operated on behalf of the client.

The system automatically:
1. Finds target companies via Google Maps and business registries based on defined ICP (Ideal Customer Profile)
2. Scrapes and analyses each prospect's website using AI
3. Generates personalised cold emails for each prospect (not template-based — actual contextual copy)
4. Sends outreach via email and LinkedIn (automated connection requests and follow-ups)

## Distinction from sister product

- **SalesAgent.cz** = active outbound AI system (finds and contacts leads)
- **Sales Robots (salesrobots.cz)** = inbound conversion widgets for websites (chatbots, callback banners, video banners)

These are complementary products, not competitors.

## Target market

- B2B companies in Czech Republic and Slovakia
- International companies expanding into CZ/SK markets
- Scale-ups needing systematic prospecting without hiring a full sales team

## Pricing model

Setup fee (one-time) + monthly running fee. Three tiers: Start (up to 200 contacts/month), Growth (up to 500 contacts/month, email + LinkedIn), Scale (unlimited, CRM integration).

## Company

Sales Robots s.r.o.
IČO: 09586563
Generála Šišky 2082/26, Praha – Modřany
info@salesagent.cz
